testcase.name: firstNameTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Reading the value of private String firstName ~> "No name" Verifying that "No name" matches the expected pattern ""?No\s+name"?" тЬУ Calling setFirstName( null ) Reading the value of private String firstName ~> "No name" Verifying that "No name" matches the expected pattern ""?No\s+name"?" тЬУ Calling setFirstName( "helbzkpjtcrenqebqjrvyaza" ) Reading the value of private String firstName ~> "helbzkpjtcrenqebqjrvyaza" тЬУ Calling getFirstName( ) тЬУ Assigning value "ieguuplh" to private String firstName Calling getFirstName( ) тЬУ

testcase.name: graduationYearTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Reading the value of private int graduationYear ~> -1 тЬУ Checking whether getGraduationYear( ) returns within [2001, 2026] ~> -1 (false) тЬУ Assigning value 2015 to private int startYear Assigning value 2022 to private int graduationYear Calling getGraduationYear( ) тЬУ

testcase.name: startYearTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Reading the value of private int startYear ~> 2026 тЬУ Calling setStartYear( 2001 ) Checking whether private int startYear is 2001 ~> 2001 (true) Calling setStartYear( 2026 ) Checking whether private int startYear is 2026 ~> 2026 (true) Calling setStartYear( 2000 ) Checking whether private int startYear is within [2001, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) Calling setStartYear( 2027 ) Checking whether private int startYear is within [2001, 2026] ~> 2026 (true) тЬУ Calling setStartYear( 2025 ) Calling getStartYear( ) тЬУ Assigning value 2020 to private int startYear Calling getStartYear( ) тЬУ

testcase.name: birthDateTests
testcase.error:
dev.m3s.maeaettae.jreq.RequirementException: None of the methods in тЯиclass StudentтЯй meet the requirements for тЯиsetBirthDateтЯй a. The method should have name matching тЯи"setBirth[Dd]ate"тЯй (0 matches) b. The method should have return type тЯиStringтЯй (7 matches) c. The method should have parameter type тЯиStringтЯй (8 matches) d. The method should have parameter count тЯи1тЯй (14 matches)
Closest match: ~> public String setPersonId( String ) at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.StudentTests.birthDateTests(StudentTests.java:260)

testcase.name: idTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Reading the value of private int id ~> 82 тЬУ Calling setId( 1 ) Checking whether private int id is 1 ~> 1 (true) Calling setId( 100 ) Checking whether private int id is 100 ~> 100 (true) Calling setId( 0 ) Checking whether private int id is within [1, 100] ~> 100 (true) Calling setId( 101 ) Checking whether private int id is within [1, 100] ~> 100 (true) тЬУ Calling setId( 16 ) Calling getId( ) тЬУ Assigning value 92 to private int id Calling getId( ) тЬУ

testcase.name: parameterizedConstructorTests
testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError:
Parameterized constructor should utilize the parameterless constructor Expected: is тЯиtrueтЯй but: was тЯиfalseтЯй (<== see Console output for more context) at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.StudentTests.parameterizedConstructorTests(StudentTests.java:83)
testcase.system-out: Calling new Student( ) Calling new Student( "wvqaltvf", "tvrpbp" ) Reading the value of private String firstName ~> "tvrpbp" тЬУ Reading the value of private String lastName ~> "wvqaltvf" тЬУ Reading the value of private int id ~> 26 тЬУ Searching for getRandomId() call in 1st constructor Found getRandomId() call in 1st constructor Searching for getRandomId() call in 2nd constructor Found getRandomId() call in 2nd constructor тЬУ
